{{Quote|Yeah...I want something for me, blast it. There is a ship in Tatooine called the Lord's Mistress. She is loaded with Corellian Brandy and I want some. Being out here makes a man want to drink.|[[Droz]]|<ref name="SWG:ItSP">{{SWGcite|exp=JtL|type=space|Inspect the Shifty Prince|Dantooine system}}</ref>}}
The '''''Lord's Mistress''''' was a [[YKL-37R Nova Courier]] owned by [[Hap Daniel]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==History==
In [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]],<ref name="SWG_timeline">{{SWG_timeline}}</ref> the ''Mistress'' was traveling through the [[Tatoo system/Legends|Tatooine system]] carrying a load of [[Corellian brandy/Legends|Corellian brandy]] when it was attacked. The [[Droz|station master]] of the [[Dantooine Space Station]] had hired a spacer to intercept the ship and steal its cargo for him. The spacer disabled the engines of the ''Mistress'' with his weapons, boarded the ship, transferred the brandy onto his ship, and then left the system to return to the [[Dantooine system/Legends|Dantooine system]].<ref name="SWG:ItLM" />

When Daniel learned of the theft, he tried to take his revenge on the spacer. He managed to track him to the Dantooine system just as the spacer was about to deliver the stolen brandy to the Dantooine Space Station. When the station master realized that Daniel would find out about his involvement in the theft, he ordered the spacer to eliminate him. It came to a dogfight between the spacer and Daniel in his [[Ixiyen-class fast attack craft|''Ixiyen''-class fast attack craft]] that ended when Daniel's ship was shot down.<ref name="SWG:DtLM">{{SWGcite|exp=JtL|type=space|Destroy the Lord's Master|Dantooine system}}</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
The ''Lord's Mistress'' appeared in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG:ItLM" /> prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref> The ''Lord's Mistress'' was added to the game with the release of the expansion pack [[Star Wars Galaxies: Jump to Lightspeed|''Jump to Lightspeed'']] on [[October 27]], [[2004]]. It was the third target of a mission that is available to players when communicating with the Dantooine Space Station. The first two targets were the ''[[Shifty Prince]]'' and the ''[[Bez'ox Mentzz]]''.<ref name="SWG:ItLM" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars Galaxies: Jump to Lightspeed]]'' {{1st}}
